ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Bond
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gerald W. Cummings for Gordon Tang, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court addressed the status of the bond filing and an ex parte petition to increase the bond amount.

Counsel reported that the bond was issued and sent to the court via UPS, which was received by the court's mailroom on November 22, 2024.

The court decided to take the status of the bond filing off calendar. Counsel was instructed to review LRSF 14.11B to ensure that the ex parte petition to increase bond amount is processed.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Bond
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Continued To Nov-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Gerald Cummings, Esq., for Gordon Tang, Trustee.

At the court's query, counsel advises of a previously filed declaration regarding the bond issue and offers the court a summary of said declaration. The court queries counsel regarding the proof of payment of sanctions. Counsel reports as to the delay and advises of the intention to immediately forward the payment to the court.

The subject matter is continued to Nov-27-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The court advises counsel that it expects both issues discussed at this hearing to be resolved by the next calling.

Judge: Hon. Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Espin. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The First Account And Report
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gerald Cummings appeared by zoom for and with Gordon Tang by zoom.

Mr. Cummings stated that both the inventory and appraisal, and the first account and report were filed last week. The clerk confirmed that the documents have been filed and that the petition was given a hearing date of December 4, 2024. The court questions whether the sanctions have been paid and raised the issue of the bond needing to be filed and increased. Mr. Cummings stated that a check for the sanctions was sent out several weeks ago, that he will follow up on the status of the check, that they found a bonding company that is willing to issue a bond for Mr. Tang, that Mr. Tang has provided the needed information to the bonding company and that he will file an ex parte petition to increase the bond. Status of the inventory, and the first account, etc. are off calendar. Status on filing of the bond is set for October 30, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Continued To Oct-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gerald Cummings appeared by zoom for and with Gordon Tang (petitioner/trustee) in person.

The court stated that it read the response to the order to show cause, that it does not see good cause for Mr. Cummings failing to appear at the last hearing and orders sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Attorney Gerald Cummings. Mr. Cummings addressed the issue of bond stating that he has spoken with several bonding companies, that they will not bond a trustee if the settlor is still alive and that the current bonding company (colonial) is willing to issue a conservatorship bond in this case. Mr. Cummings also stated that failure to file the inventory and appraisal is completely his fault, that the trust has been fully funded with the Schwab accounts in August of last year and that the amounts will show up in the trust accounting. In addition, Mr. Cummings stated that all of the Schwab statements from August of last year are with the fiduciary who is preparing the accounting. The court reminded Mr. Tang of his responsibility as a trustee. Mr. Tang stated that when the accounting is done, he will be engaging the services of a firm that is better equipped to handle this case. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to October 2, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Fling Of The First Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Continued To Oct-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-24-2024 Continued To Aug-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Trustee Gordon Tang and the Attorney Gerald Cummings to appear on August 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for approval of the trustee's first account and report have not been filed.

An order to show cause re sanctions is being issued to Attorney Gerald Cummings to appear on August 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear.

An order to show cause is being issued to Trustee Gordon Tang to appear on August 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why he should not be suspended for failure to file the inventory and appraisal, and for failure to file the first account and report.

Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal, and status on filing of the first account and report are continued to August 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Inventory And Appraisal

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-12-2024 Continued To Jun-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-21-304950 Conservatorship of Malee Tang and
PTR-24-307099 The Amended and Restated Malee Tang Trust.

Appearances: Gerald Cummings appeared by zoom for Gordon Tang.

Mr. Cummings stated that he misunderstood what today's date was and that his petition got rejected because he indicated today's date as the hearing date. Mr. Cummings also stated that the inventory and appraisal for the trust matter is almost completed and that the bonding company had difficulty issuing the bond. Status on filing of the first account and status on filing of the inventory and appraisal are continued to June 26, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The above-mentioned documents are to be filed by June 19, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Continued To Jun-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gerald Cummings appeared by zoom for Gordon Tang (trustee).

Mr. Cummings that the inventory and appraisal should be filed within the next week or so, and that the bond should be issued and ready for his client to sign within a few days. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to June 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
